chumphon-pinnacle.name: Chumphon Pinnacle
divingTips: test

sail-rock.name: Sail Rock
divingTips: test

twins-pinnacle.name: Twins Pinnacle
twins-pinnacle.overview: Koh Tao's most popular dive site featuring three granite pinnacles with abundant marine life and perfect for all certification levels.

quickFacts.location: West coast of Koh Nang Yuan

divingTips: Perfect for Open Water divers and training dives
Explore the deeper western pinnacle first
Navigate to the middle pinnacle and check the arch on the north side
Look under overhangs at the shallow pinnacle
Don’t miss the famous clownfish with Sebae anemone
Note: there is a stone circle around the clownfish - do not enter
Great for macro photography
Practice buoyancy on the arch and rock formations
Nearby Buoyancy World is designed for buoyancy practice
Excellent for marine awareness and identification courses
Easy navigation thanks to the three pinnacles

mango-bay.name: Mango Bay
mango-bay.overview: Shallow coral reefs perfect for relaxed diving with thriving marine ecosystems.
divingTips: Perfect for beginner divers and training
Excellent for snorkeling as well
Look for seagrass grazers and reef life
Great for underwater photography
Calm waters ideal for learning buoyancy
Multiple coral bommies to explore
Good site for extended dives
Perfect for Open Water certification dives

south-west-pinnacle.name: South West Pinnacle
divingTips: test

japanese-gardens.name: Japanese Gardens
japanese-gardens.overview: Japanese Gardens is a beautiful dive site near Koh Nang Yuan, known for its diverse coral reef and abundant marine life. Suitable for all levels.
divingTips: Best time is November–May for visibility.
Look for unique triggerfish and octopus.
Great for underwater photography.
